findings.title: Context recall missed release evidence preference
findings.summary: A release planning task did not surface the expected release-evidence preference.
findings.expected: The context pack should include a release-evidence memory.
findings.actual: The context pack returned lower-relevance release workflow memories first.
findings.notes: Synthetic example with no private project text.

findings.title: Pilot runbook needs a shorter setup path
findings.summary: The pilot setup steps are correct but require too much command scanning.
findings.expected: A first-time user can find the minimal pilot start command quickly.
findings.actual: The setup guidance is split across multiple dogfood documents.
findings.notes: Synthetic example with no private project text.
